name: SECURITY NATIONAL FINANCIAL CORP
business: Security National Financial Corp operates in three segments: life insurance, cemetery and mortuary, and mortgages. The life insurance segment sells funeral plans, interest-sensitive life insurance, annuities, and accident and health insurance in 42 states. The cemetery and mortuary segment operates cemeteries and mortuaries in Utah, California, and New Mexico, offering pre-need and at-need services. The mortgage segment originates residential and commercial loans through 85 retail offices in 25 states.
sellsTo: individuals aged 45-85 for insurance and cemetery products
real estate brokers and builders for mortgages
low to moderate income individuals for funeral plans

exposures.sentence: The life insurance segment is engaged in the business of selling and servicing selected lines of life insurance, annuity products, and accident and health insurance.
The mortgage segment originates and underwrites or otherwise purchases residential and commercial loans for new construction, existing homes, and other real estate projects.
The Company is capitalizing on the opportunity to develop commercial and residential assets on its existing and recently acquired properties.
